summary: PHASE 13.6 Alpha DAG comprehensive backend testing completed successfully. All 14 specified endpoints tested and working correctly. DAG built with 293 nodes (97 features, 89 transforms, 107 factors), 495 edges, depth 3 levels. Execution time ~2ms with 100% cache hit rate on repeated calls. Levelized scheduling enables max parallelism of 106 nodes per level.
passed_tests: POST /api/alpha-dag/build - DAG built: 293 nodes, 495 edges, depth=3 ✅
GET /api/alpha-dag/nodes - listing with type/level filters working ✅
Integration test: full workflow with caching verification ✅
critical_code_review_comments: Code is well-structured with clear separation: builder, optimizer, scheduler, executor, cache, repository, routes
All 16 transform types properly implemented: zscore, ema, sma, rolling_mean, rolling_std, rolling_zscore, lag, diff, percentile, rank, log, abs, sign, clip, normalize, threshold
Levelized scheduling correctly implements parallel execution (3 levels with max 106 nodes per level)
Input-hash based caching works correctly - 100% cache hit rate on repeated calls with same data
MongoDB _id properly excluded in all repository queries
Execution time well under target: ~2ms average vs 15ms target

success_rate.backend: 100% - All 24 pytest tests passed, all 14 endpoints working correctly
success_rate.frontend: N/A - Backend only testing as requested

seed_data_creation: DAG built from 107 approved factors from PHASE 13.4 Factor Ranker
context_for_next_testing_agent: PHASE 13.6 Alpha DAG is fully functional. DAG has 293 nodes (97 features, 89 transforms, 107 factors) and 495 edges with depth 3. Key features: levelized scheduling for parallel execution (max 106 nodes per level), input-hash based caching (100% hit rate on repeated calls), streaming mode support. Execution time ~2ms (well under 15ms target). All endpoints tested via pytest in /app/backend/tests/test_phase136_alpha_dag.py
